title: Armorstands Reimagined
body:
![Render](https://i.gyazo.com/445f3703ca7848441f842ca3e9ef136c.png)

### This pack is originally from my pack [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) but I thought some people may like it but not my pack, so I decided to give it, it's standalone pack!

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

This pack simply makes armorstands look a lot more like something capable of wearing heavy metal armor!
It's also completely compatible with custom armorstand poses!

(Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or Optifine for the model to show up!)

![Preview](https://i.gyazo.com/db502e76c14b356c835483f48e58a0eb.gif) 

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

[![Discord](https://i.gyazo.com/27c2c5a92a9c063d5d71e74afaabc22d.png)](https://discord.gg/rstmkrGeFJ)
